blended.narrative: Discovery is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,393 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 7" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Tomorrow: 2.1" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 9.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 50".
